mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, merchant_id, total_amount, pay_amount, delivery_fee, discount_amount, receiver_name, receiver_phone, delivery_address, remark, status, pay_type, pay_time, deliver_time, complete_time, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM biz_order WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM biz_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_order (order_no, user_id, merchant_id, total_amount, pay_amount, delivery_fee, discount_amount, receiver_name, receiver_phone, delivery_address, remark, status, pay_type) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{payType})
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_order SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
